wallet_description: Install {link} if you don't have one yet, and copy/paste your address here.

profile_ineligible_both_self: You can't vote: no locked balance and unlock date is too soon

vote_disabled_both: {name} has no locked balance and unlock date is too soon — cannot vote for them

replace_description: Lock more COOP and unlock an equivalent amount of GBYTE at the formula price.
replace_error_no_bytes: Not enough locked GBYTE to cover this amount
replace_error_amount_too_high: Amount exceeds your locked COOP balance

deposit_desc_attest: Before locking, you must be attested on {telegram} and/or {discord}.
deposit_desc_real_name: If you lock less than {minBalance}, you must be {realName}. This measure helps prevent multiple accounts by the same user.
deposit_banner_title: You are not yet eligible for voting and distributions
deposit_banner_short_lock: Extend your lock period to at least 1 year to become eligible.
deposit_banner_both: Lock tokens for at least 1 year to become eligible.
how_it_works_lock_desc: Lock COOP or GBYTE for 1+ year to earn voting power and emission share.
how_it_works_emission_desc: New COOP is minted daily — locked rewards grow your balance, liquid rewards are claimable.
how_it_works_vote_desc: Vote for useful contributors. Bigger lock — stronger vote. Votes expire in 3 months.
hero_title: Earn rewards for {contributing} to the community
hero_subtitle: Lock tokens, vote for contributors, and receive daily emission rewards. All governed by the community.
governance_connect_wallet_intro: {wallet} to see your voting power and vote on parameter changes.
governance_profile_balance_tooltip: Your total locked balance used to calculate voting power and emission rewards.
governance_profile_voting_power_tooltip: Square root of your locked balance. Determines the weight of your governance votes.
governance_desc_daily_locked_reward: Fraction of total locked balance minted daily and added to locked balances.
governance_desc_daily_liquid_reward: Fraction of total locked balance minted daily and distributed as liquid COOP.
governance_desc_bytes_reducer: Discount factor applied when converting GBYTE balance to COOP equivalent for emission calculations.
governance_desc_by_votes_share: Share of emission distributed proportionally to votes received (vs. votes × balance).
governance_desc_referrer_coop_deposit_re: Share of COOP deposits credited to the referrer as a reward.
governance_desc_referrer_bytes_deposit_r: Share of GBYTE deposits credited to the referrer as a reward.
governance_desc_referral_reward: Fixed COOP reward for referrer and referee on first deposit.
governance_desc_min_balance_instead_of_r: Minimum COOP balance that exempts a user from real-name attestation.
governance_desc_messaging_attestors: Colon-separated list of attestor addresses for Telegram/Discord verification.
governance_desc_real_name_attestors: Colon-separated list of attestor addresses for real-name verification.
qr_tooltip: Send the transaction from your mobile phone
qr_dialog_title: Scan this QR code with your mobile phone
qr_install_prompt: Install Obyte wallet for {ios} or {android} if you don't have one yet
wallet_popover_tooltip: This will open your Obyte wallet installed on this device to complete the transaction.
faq_a_what: COOP is a token on Obyte designed to encourage cooperative community engagement. The initial supply is 0 — all COOP is created through daily emission and distributed among participants who lock their tokens and contribute to the community.
faq_q_goal: What is the goal of COOP?
faq_a_goal: The goal is to reinvigorate the Obyte community by anchoring positive emotions, rewarding contributions, making people return to the community, and encouraging organic activity.
faq_a_start: Deposit COOP or GBYTE to the COOP Autonomous Agent. Your funds are locked for at least 1 year. You must be attested on Telegram or Discord (for bot notifications) and either real-name attested or deposit at least 500 COOP.
faq_a_emission: Every day, 1% of the total locked balance is added to locked balances, and 0.1% is distributed as liquid COOP. This emission is split 50/50: half goes proportionally to votes received (benefits work contributors), half goes proportionally to votes multiplied by balance (benefits financial contributors).
faq_q_contributions: What are the types of contributions?
faq_a_contributions: There are three main types: (1) Work — development (tools, apps, improvements) and social (articles, tweets, videos); (2) Financial — buying and locking COOP/GBYTE in significant amounts; (3) Curation — recognizing contributors, encouraging votes, discovering underappreciated work, and supporting healthy discussions.
faq_a_voting: Users cast votes for others who make useful contributions. Vote weight equals the square root of the voter's locked balance — a middle ground between democracy and plutocracy. Vote strength can be 1, 2, or 3 (use 0 to unvote). Votes expire after 3 months, so contributors must keep contributing to maintain their income.
faq_q_eligibility: Who is eligible to vote and receive distributions?
faq_a_eligibility: Your unlock date must be at least 1 year into the future. This ensures that participants have long-term commitment to the community.
faq_q_gbyte: Can I lock GBYTE instead of COOP?
faq_a_gbyte: Yes. The COOP price in GBYTE follows a formula that starts at 1 and doubles every year. If the market price of COOP grows faster than the formula, buy pressure redirects to GBYTE. You can also replace locked GBYTE with locked COOP at the formula price, which creates buy pressure on COOP whenever its market price exceeds the formula.
faq_a_referrals: When making your first deposit, you can indicate a referrer. Both get a fixed reward (capped by balances) to their locked accounts. The referrer also receives 1% of your lifetime deposits in liquid COOP. Referrers can waive this reward for family and friends.
faq_a_tit_for_tat: It's not prohibited. However, it requires separate negotiation for each arrangement and doesn't scale as well as posting about genuine contributions and receiving many votes in response. It resembles the FRIEND token mechanics and encourages pairwise connections, which is useful too.
faq_a_governance: Almost all parameters are changeable by governance vote. Only users with an unlock date more than 1 year into the future can vote. Governance uses quadratic voting (vote weight = square root of locked balance), reducing the power of whales.
faq_q_growth: What happens when the community grows?
faq_a_growth: As the number of contributors grows, voters raise their standards. The community stays relatively small, which keeps it more connected and manageable, where individual voices are heard and contributions are impactful. This creates an air of exclusivity that makes belonging even more attractive.
faq_a_why: Motivations include: making money through emission rewards, belonging to a community of builders, having the power to recognize and reward others, being appreciated for your contributions, and acquiring a leadership role by influencing votes.
